column1: # Effort-actual comparators — EMPTY SCHEMA (seed before wiring the LLM step).
# Each row is a CONFIRMED past project whose ACTUAL effort in person-days is known and
# human-verified. Only confirmed rows are evidence. Do NOT fabricate rows or figures.
# name                short human-readable name of the past project / phase
# actual_effort_days  the KNOWN actual effort in person-days (human-confirmed)
# confirmed           true|false — only `true` rows are used as evidence
# similarity_notes    optional free text: scope/tech/team overlap to judge closeness
# completed_on        optional ISO date the comparator actually finished
